gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用幽默包装深情，误打误撞的浪漫奇遇令人心动。
gems.whyWatchEn: A heartfelt romantic comedy that uses voicemail mishaps to explore love, grief, and unexpected connection with charm and wit.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松浪漫、带点奇幻元素和温情剧情的观众
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted romance with a touch of whimsy and emotional depth

gems.title: 鬼玩人：炼狱
gems.summary: 丈夫去世后，一名女子前往娘家偏僻的祖宅寻求慰藉。随着家人一个个被转化为“邪灵”，让这场聚会变成了来自地狱的家庭重逢，她逐渐发现，自己在生前许下的誓言，即便在死后依然索命不休。
gems.summaryEn: After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she took in life survive even in death.
gems.whyWatch: 家庭聚会被邪灵搅局，死后誓言成恐怖枷锁。
gems.whyWatchEn: A fresh and terrifying take on grief and family curses, where the dead refuse to let go of promises made in life.
gems.audience: 喜欢心理恐怖、民俗元素和家庭悲剧题材的恐怖片爱好者
gems.audienceEn: Horror fans who appreciate psychological tension, folklore, and family-driven terror

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 玩具们直面数字时代，科技与童心的温情碰撞。
gems.whyWatchEn: A surprisingly poignant exploration of how classic toys navigate a world obsessed with screens and AI companions.
gems.audience: 怀旧粉丝、亲子家庭以及关注科技对童年影响的观众
gems.audienceEn: Nostalgic fans, families with children, and viewers interested in how technology shapes playtime
